series_metadata.series_title: BOARD, COMMISSIONS, COUNCILS AND AUTHORITIES MEETING FILES
series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, meeting subject files, applications, supporting documentation, staff write up and reviews, presentation materials and resolutions, minutes, and other related documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for period specified for electronic format, then destroy. If converted to electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed after verification of successful conversion and review by State Archives as required. ; Electronic: Retain for the term of project (if applicable) plus two years. AFTER EXPIRATION OF RETENTION PERIOD: STATE ARCHIVE REVIEW IS REQUIRED for the following: official meeting minutes, formation and establishment records, bylaws, resolutions, official reports, appointment and designee letters, and reports to the General Assembly.. ALL OTHER RECORDS IN THIS SERIES: destroy after the retention period has elapsed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
